<?php namespace Vonage\Client\Credentials\Handler; use Psr\Http\Message\RequestInterface; use Vonage\Client\Credentials\CredentialsInterface; use Vonage\Client\Credentials\SignatureSecret; use Vonage\Client\Signature; class SignatureQueryHandler extends AbstractHandler { public function __invoke(RequestInterface $request, CredentialsInterface $credentials): RequestInterface { $credentials = $this->extract(SignatureSecret::class, $credentials); $credentialsArray = $credentials->asArray(); $query = []; parse_str($request->getUri()->getQuery(), $query); $query['api_key'] = $credentialsArray['api_key']; $signature = new Signature( $query, $credentialsArray['signature_secret'], $credentialsArray['signature_method'] ); return $request->withUri( $request->getUri()->withQuery(http_build_query($signature->getSignedParams())) ); } }
